hooks.command: jq -e '[.tool_input.file_path?, .tool_response.filePath?, (.tool_input.command? // "" | scan("(?m)^\\*\\*\\* (?:Add File|Update File): ([^\\n]+)")[]?)] | map(select(type == "string" and test("\\.rs$"))) | length > 0' >/dev/null 2>&1 && root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && make -C "$root" fmt >/dev/null 2>&1 || true

root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && output=$(make -C "$root" clippy 2>&1) || { printf '%s' "$output" | jq -Rs '{decision:"block", reason:("Clippy failed - fix before stopping:\n" + .)}'; exit 0; }; output=$(make -C "$root" test 2>&1) || printf '%s' "$output" | jq -Rs '{decision:"block", reason:("Tests failed - fix before stopping:\n" + .)}'
